'''Ebiwaan''' was an astronomical object<ref name="GG9" /> located in the [[Sarin sector/Legends|Sarin sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was the endpoint of the [[Leisure Corridor]], a [[Merchant/Legends|trade]] and tourism [[Hyperspace route/Legends|route]] that started at the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="GG9" />

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], between [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], Ebiwaan was considered to be deep in [[Imperial Space]]. The [[Jesoni-class liner|''Jesoni''-class liner]] ''[[Culroon Minstrel]]'' operated on the Leisure Corridor from Coruscant to Ebiwaan.<ref name="GG9" />

==Behind the scenes==
''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]'' originally suggested that Ebiwaan was situated in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Middle Rim]].<ref name="GG9" /> ''[[Pirates & Privateers]]'' later indicated that Ebiwaan was located in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]].<ref name="PP">''[[Pirates & Privateers]]''</ref> Eventually, ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the [[Ebiwaan system/Legends|Ebiwaan system]] in the Outer Rim Territories.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
